In this lesson, you're going to learn something I barely teach outside of my personal high level masterminds in groups. And that is the launch formula. How to let the world know about your product, your service, your group, your mastermind in a way that nothing else compares. This has personally impacted my business and my life by millions of dollars and I'm so excited to share it with you.
